text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh... You saw that, huh? Hehe, what'd you think? I was totally rad,
right?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You were the best... But I was wondering how you felt, you know, at
the time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You really are kind. Thank you... but I'm okay.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
It's not that! I mean, I'm not being kind or anything. I just... wasn't sure
about something.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen, you breezed through this year's preliminaries. You used the
breaststroke in the freestyle... and dominated the other events...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: About that, Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I know. It's not just games, it's a competition. And you're not the type
of person to hold back, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Not one other person could make it a challenge for you! As soon as I
realized that, I... I felt so bad!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
So I made a decision. I'll train harder for the finals and become a
better player... That's what I wanted to tell you.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to give you a great match this year! So don't get eliminated
until you face me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I'll be the one to take you down! That's my challenge to you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, Chiyo...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Your challenge to me, huh? You really are kind...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Just make sure that you don't get taken out before we face off either,
okay? Victory will be mine, so bring everything you've got!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah! Okay! You don't even have to ask! I'm going for the win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the finals at last, and the participants, each with their
own aspirations, set off for Makimi Island!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
This is it! We're about to kick off the final competition of Splash
Rec—the water gun battle!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Their swimsuits are so cute!
Good luck out there!
Wow, they're for real!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship, I trust you haven't forgotten our promise.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Of course not. Because I'm the one who's going to win.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Calling all players, please proceed to your starting positions! I will
now explain the rules, simple as they may be!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Any player hit by the colored water of another player's water gun is
eliminated! That's it! Getting wet from normal water, be it from rivers
or the ocean, doesn't count!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Cameras have been placed all over the island to monitor the battle!
Use your phone to see anywhere you want! Oh, this is just too
exciting!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Anything on the island can be used! Touching another player,
however, is not allowed! Sneaking up from behind, going head to
head, and teaming up are all allowed.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The most important rule is "last person standing wins"! And that
concludes the rules! Now, everyone, I hope you're ready to watch the
game of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Island-Wide Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Get ready! The final battle has commenced! Who will be the first to
find an opponent?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
(First, I need to remain calm and reduce the enemy number. Gold
Ship will have to wait until after that.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Sneaking and running around takes quite a toll on my stamina.
Aaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What happened? I heard multiple screams!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is this? Why is everyone sitting down? Don't tell me you've
all been eliminated...

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Pink
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! We teamed up together, but just a moment ago, Nakayama got
all three of us!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Blue
text_block_list.text:
Hey, doesn't that dune over there look way suspicious? I bet
someone's hiding behind it. Let's check it out!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Pink
text_block_list.text:
Wait! Something's poking out from the rock next to it... Ah, isn't that
the same color as Nakayama's shirt?

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Green
text_block_list.text:
So that's it—just the kind of trick she'd use. She's drawing our
attention to the dune, while she hides behind the rock.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Pink
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, we won't fall for that! Let's flank her and—huh? Aagh!

text_block_list.name: All Three
text_block_list.text: Kyaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Hahahaha! How adorably... naive! The moment you're sure of victory
is when you let your guard down most.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Didn't you think for one second that the shirt behind the rock was the
real trick? I made a bet on whether you'd choose the dune or the
rock.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
If you went for the dune, or if I couldn't stand the heat any longer, I'd
have lost.

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: And if you chose the rock... Well, as you saw, I won against all of you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What a huge risk to take... Wait, is she still nearby?!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume in Green
text_block_list.text:
Actually, she wasn't able to stand the heat after all. She's on the
ground over there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Goodness, you're covered in sand! Nakayama, are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... Quit worrying. I actually feel pretty refreshed now. Heh,
hahaha... I'm burned out. Put me out of my misery.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You're just... unbelievable. Very well, I'll cool you down, as you wish.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Fire! ...As a Mejiro, this is not exactly a satisfying way to win.

text_block_list.name: Island-Wide Announcement
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen has coolly defeated Nakayama Festa! With four
players remaining, it's still anyone's guess who will win!
